problem id: 77819d4e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  01100011 -> 11011110
  00110011 -> 11101110
  00011010 -> 10110110
  10101100 -> 01111011
  11001111 -> 11111111
  01010110 -> 10111101
  10101001 -> 01111010
  00100010 -> 11001100

query: 01010100
predicted answer: 10111101
